description_long: This is a modern tactical axe featuring a robust, straight handle with a textured grip and a prominent pommel at the base. The head of the axe is broad and angular, with one side forming a sharp, wedge-shaped cutting edge and the opposite side tapering into a pointed spike. The blade has a flat top and a beveled edge, with additional geometric cutouts and serrations along the lower edge for added functionality or aesthetics. The entire object appears to be constructed from a single piece of dark, matte-finished metal, giving it a sleek and utilitarian appearance. The handle is cylindrical with subtle grooves for improved grip, and the overall design suggests durability and effectiveness for heavy-duty urban or rescue tasks.
description: A modern, all-black tactical axe with a straight, textured handle and a broad, angular blade featuring a sharp edge and pointed spike. The design is sleek, robust, and utilitarian, suitable for demanding urban tasks.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the narrow profile of the handle and the head, with the blade and spike edges barely visible.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the full shape of the axe head, including the wide blade, pointed spike, and the detailed handle grip.
description_view_2: The bottom view highlights the cylindrical handle and pommel, with the head's width minimized and only the central axis visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the blade, spike, and handle details from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, likely steel or polymer, with textured grip grooves and a rounded pommel for secure handling.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, angular blade with a single sharp edge, flat top, pointed spike on the opposite side, and serrated lower edge; geometric cutouts for weight reduction or aesthetics.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern integrated or molded construction, likely a single-piece or composite design with no visible traditional mounting.
